tuning: E A D G B E

strumming.part: Pattern 1 (x4, hold last strum on repeats *)

content:
[Intro] 
[ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]    x2

[Verse 1]
[tab]N.C.      [ch]F#m[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
They say, Oh, my God, I see the way you shine[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
Take your hand, my dear, and place them both in mine[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
You know, you stopped me dead while I was passing by[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]C#m[/ch]
And now I beg to see you dance just one more time[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, I see you, see you, see you every time[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
And oh, my I-I, I-I like your style[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
You, you make me, make me, make me wanna cry[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                                  N.C.
And now I beg to see you dance just one  more time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.      [ch]F#m[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
So I say dance for me, dance for me, dance for me, oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
I never seen anybody do the things you do before[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
They say move for me, move for me, move for me, ay-ay-ay[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]
And when you're done I'll make you do it all again[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
I said, oh, my God, I see you walking by[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
Take my hands, my dear, and look me in my  eyes[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
Just like a monkey I've been dancing my whole life[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                                    [ch]C#m[/ch]
And you just beg to see me dance just one  more time[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, I see you, see you, see you every time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
And oh, my, I, I, I, I like your style[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                                    N.C.
And now I beg to see you dance just one more time[/tab]

Woah-oh, woah-oh, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
